M-022.NAME: device-provisioning-api
M-022.owns: user-facing device management, stealth-aware config retrieval and device-bound provisioning APIs

exports.fn-create-device: Creates a device and provisions a distinct peer or rejects on plan limit
exports.fn-rotate-device-config: Reissues peer material for one logical device while invalidating the old config
exports.fn-revoke-device: Revokes a specific device and frees or preserves a slot according to policy
exports.fn-download-stealth-config: Returns AmneziaWG config and QR payload with CLIENT_PROFILE and preshared-key parity
exports.fn-pending-trial-first-config: Allows verified users with pending trial access to create/reuse primary device and retrieve first config before the countdown starts

phase-45-scope.primary-behaviors: pending trial access counts as config-eligible for first VPN config retrieval without changing paid plan/device semantics.
phase-45-scope.evidence: 2026-06-01: Phase-45 backend suite passed and includes vpn_router_compat plus pending trial access coverage.

phase-70-scope.primary-behaviors: Device-facing config routes keep current shape; QR/download/config parity tests cover active config payload without changing device registration, limits, or provisioning semantics.
phase-70-scope.evidence: 2026-06-04: Phase-70 router tests passed 13/13 and protected deploy/create-client.sh surface remained unchanged.

M-022.hotspot: H-017: QR/raw config endpoints must not diverge in profile or preshared-key content
